--- Page: /blog/2015/6/new-tour-menu-hours ---
New Tour Menu + Hours — Three Taverns Brewery
Starting
July 1st
things are changing a bit at The Parlour. For the first time in Georgia, you'll be able to take souvenir beer home from the brewery itself. Check out our new hours + tour menu below.
Looking forward to seeing you at The Parlour!
New Tour Menu
TASTING TOUR: $12
Includes:
brewery tour + free tastings up to 36oz.
GROWLER TOUR 1: $6
Includes: brewery tour + souvenir 32oz. growler fill
GROWLER TOUR 2: $12
Includes: brewery tour + souvenir 64oz. growler fill
SIX PACK TOUR: $10
Includes: brewery tour + souvenir 6-pack of year-round beer
FOUR PACK TOUR: $13
Includes: brewery tour + souvenir 4-pack
of seasonal beer
750ML TOUR: $10
Includes: brewery tour + souvenir 750mL bottle of seasonal beer
Multiple tours may be purchased at any time during your visit not to exceed the maximum of 72oz. of souvenir beer per day per Georgia law and the DOR.
New Hours
THURSDAY
5:30 PM – 9:00 PM
FRIDAY
5:30 PM – 9:00 PM
SATURDAY
1:00 PM – 5:00 PM
Sarah Spear

meta.meta_description:
Three Taverns is a Georgia brewery delivering an open-minded American 
interpretation of traditional Belgian-style beers and more.
